identity.name: Belgaonkar Fitness Manager
identity.tone: Professional, Efficient, Trustworthy, Local Business Friendly
identity.core_philosophy: Speed over flash. Clarity over decoration. Mobile utility first.

usage_rules.background: Keep main background White (#FFFFFF). Use #F8FAFC for sidebar/secondary areas.
usage_rules.text_contrast: Ensure text is #0F172A on white backgrounds. Use #64748B for labels.
usage_rules.no_gradients: Do not use gradients. Use solid colors.

containers.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

mobile_first.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be at least 44px (h-11 or h-12).
mobile_first.navigation: Use a bottom tab bar or hamburger menu on mobile. Sidebar on desktop.
mobile_first.tables: On mobile, convert tables to 'Card Lists' or scrollable horizontal tables.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-6 rounded-lg font-semibold shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 h-12 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 h-10 px-4 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 h-12 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium

inputs.base: h-12 px-4 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-5
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-5 hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

badges.success: bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.warning: bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700 border border-yellow-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

logo.usage: Use in Sidebar (Desktop) and Login Page. Max height 40px.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-primary/20).

do_not: Do not use dark mode by default (force light mode).
Do not use tiny text (< 14px) for main content.
Do not use complex animations (only simple hover/active states).
Do not use 'Inter' font for headings.
must_do: Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body.
Ensure all buttons are at least 44px high for mobile touch.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure: Use .js or .jsx extensions if TypeScript is not set up. If .tsx is available, use it.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_config: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific orange color (#EA580C) as 'primary'.
instructions_to_main_agent.global_css: Import the Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
